# CGImageDestinationCopyTypeIdentifiers()

**Function**

Returns an array of the uniform type identifiers that are supported for image destinations.

## Declaration

```swift
func CGImageDestinationCopyTypeIdentifiers() -> CFArray
```

## Return Value

Returns an array of the uniform type identifiers that image destinations support. For a list of system-declared and third-party identifiers, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UniformTypeIdentifiers].

## Getting the Image Types

- **CGImageDestinationGetTypeID()**: Returns the unique type identifier of an image destination opaque type.
